module.name: rule-map
module.description: Builds the canonical plugin rule map and exports preset-aware rule configurations for consumption by flat and legacy config builders.

scenarios.name: should return preset-specific entries for the Recommended preset
scenarios.given: Preset.Recommended is passed to buildRules
scenarios.then: returns a rules record where default preset rules use their configured recommended entries

scenarios.name: should return preset-specific entries for the Strict preset
scenarios.given: Preset.Strict is passed to buildRules
scenarios.then: returns a rules record where default preset rules use their configured strict entries

scenarios.name: should prefix every rule key with the plugin namespace
scenarios.given: any preset is passed to buildRules
scenarios.when: Object.keys of the result is inspected
scenarios.then: every key starts with 'zero-tolerance/'

scenarios.name: should include max-function-lines with parameterised severity
scenarios.given: buildRules is called with Preset.Recommended
scenarios.then: returns an array entry with 'warn' and the recommended max-lines option

scenarios.name: should keep prefer-result-return relaxed in built-in presets
scenarios.given: buildRules is called for the Recommended and Strict presets
scenarios.then: the rule is set to off in Recommended and warn in Strict

scenarios.name: should keep require-bdd-spec disabled in both built-in presets
scenarios.given: buildRules is called for the Recommended and Strict presets
scenarios.then: both preset entries are set to 'off' so the rule stays opt-in by default

scenarios.name: should keep no-parent-internal-access disabled in both built-in presets
scenarios.given: buildRules is called for the Recommended and Strict presets
scenarios.then: both preset entries are set to 'off' so the rule stays opt-in by default

scenarios.name: should keep no-fetch-in-tests disabled in both built-in presets
scenarios.given: buildRules is called for the Recommended and Strict presets
scenarios.then: both preset entries are set to 'off' so the rule stays opt-in by default

scenarios.name: should keep no-restricted-imports-in-tests disabled in both built-in presets
scenarios.given: buildRules is called for the Recommended and Strict presets
scenarios.then: both preset entries are set to 'off' so the rule stays opt-in by default

scenarios.name: should include no-set-interval-in-tests in built-in presets
scenarios.given: buildRules is called for the Recommended and Strict presets
scenarios.then: the rule is set to warn in Recommended and error in Strict

scenarios.name: should include no-set-timeout-in-tests in built-in presets
scenarios.given: buildRules is called for the Recommended and Strict presets

scenarios.then: the rule is set to off in Recommended and warn in Strict
